arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke confident ahead of long-awaited England return
arts.sum: Spurs' new number 19 was sidelined with an ankle injury ahead of September's international break, but has been included in Lee Carsley's second squad for this month's UEFA Nations League fixtures against Greece on Thursday before a trip to Finland three days later. Beyond a steady trickle of strikes, which swelled with a 19-goal haul for Bournemouth last term, extensive top-flight experience has aided Solanke's development since his premature England debut.

arts.ttl: Newcastle Could Reach Another Level With Transfer Coup for Perfect Anthony Gordon Partner
arts.sum: The Magpies have been linked with one of European football's top attacking players in Bayern Munich's Leroy Sane.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish questions Euro 2024 England snub
arts.sum: Manchester City winger Jack Grealish has admitted that he "did not agree" with Gareth Southgate's decision to omit him from England's Euro 2024 squad. During City's title-winning season, he only managed a measly four goal contributions in 20 Premier League appearances.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley chasing unprecedented England record in Greece Nations League clash
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley could make history for the Three Lions with a victory in Thursday's UEFA Nations League encounter with Greece.

arts.ttl: Time for Dominic Solanke if Harry Kane is out? – England v Greece talking points
arts.sum: Kane suffered an injury playing for Bayern Munich at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Conor McGregor off the hook for Arsenal antics as Bukayo Saka sends message
arts.sum: The former two-division champion faced a lot of criticism from Arsenal fans following his behaviour after the Gunners' win over PSG last week

arts.ttl: Phil Foden shares what players in the England squad privately say about Aston Villa’s Ezri Konsa
arts.sum: Ezri Konsa has had to pull out of Lee Carsley’s latest England squad. The Aston Villa defender suffered an injury at the weekend against Manchester...

arts.ttl: Madueke confident Chelsea teammate will produce for England
arts.sum: Noni Madueke is confident that Chelsea teammate Cole Palmer can produce his club form for England ahead of this month’s international break. Palmer has started the season in superb form with six goals and five assists in seven Premier League appearances, continuing on the form that saw him named PFA Young Player of the Year […] The post Madueke confident Chelsea teammate will produce for England first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star tipped to captain England by Alan Shearer
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is a future England captain, according to Three Lions legend Alan Shearer, who has sung the praises of the Arsenal winger. I am 100% certain Saka could be a future England captain.”

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names next England captain as he issues warning to Lee Carsley
arts.sum: England are considering how best to replace Harry Kane as their captain, with several Three Lions stars pushing to take over from the Bayern Munich striker as skipper
